implementing machine learning algorithms to tackle business problems

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's emphasis on 'Social responsibility' (Core Competence B) and data analytics skills can be applied to improve resource efficiency (Target 12.2) and encourage sustainable business practices (Target 12.6).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Data analytics skills, while broadly applicable, have a very weak and indirect link to supporting effective, accountable, and transparent institutions (Target 16.6) as it is not a course focus.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly builds data science and analytical capacity, which is crucial for generating high-quality data and supporting statistical capacity-building for monitoring SDG progress (Targets 17.18 and 17.19).
